message:
fix: replace plain Error throws with QueryModeError in client + wasm-engine

client.ts (15 sites): all validation errors now throw QueryModeError
with QUERY_FAILED code — enables consistent error handling via
err.code in user code and proper HTTP status mapping in worker.ts.

wasm-engine.ts (22 sites): OOM → MEMORY_EXCEEDED, decompression
failures → INVALID_FORMAT, unsupported dtypes → SCHEMA_MISMATCH.

r2-spill.ts (2 sites): bad magic → INVALID_FORMAT, missing spill
object → QUERY_FAILED.

parquet-decode.ts (1 site): unknown codec → INVALID_FORMAT.
